<p class="key-answer" data-question="Sufentanil Citrate 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Sufentanil Citrate</strong> 目前有 <strong>30 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Sufentanil Citrate 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Dzuveo is indicated for the management of acute moderate to severe pain in adult patients.</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>nephrogenic syndrome of inappropriate antidiuresis（97.4%）</li>
<li>common cold（96.8%）</li>
<li>gastroduodenitis（86.8%）</li>
<li>peptic ulcer disease（85.0%）</li>
<li>exercise-induced malignant hyperthermia（83.7%）</li>
<li>headache disorder（81.0%）</li>
<li>trigeminal autonomic cephalalgia（79.6%）</li>
<li>familial periodic paralysis（75.7%）</li>
<li>nephrogenic diabetes insipidus（74.8%）</li>
<li>obsolete rare pulmonary disease（74.5%）</li>
<li>allergic urticaria（74.0%）</li>
<li>nasal cavity disease（73.7%）</li>
<li>acute laryngopharyngitis（70.8%）</li>
<li>Jeune syndrome（70.7%）</li>
<li>pharyngitis（70.6%）</li>
<li>hypokalemic periodic paralysis（69.8%）</li>
<li>malignant hyperthermia of anesthesia（69.4%）</li>
<li>malignant hyperthermia, susceptibility to（69.3%）</li>
<li>subarachnoid hemorrhage (disease)（67.3%）</li>
<li>hereditary renal hypouricemia（66.8%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>

</div>
